title: Trump proposes 20-year enrichment moratorium from Air Force One — 'real guarantee' condition, shift from permanent halt demand
snippet: Trump said he would accept a 20-year suspension of Iran's uranium enrichment if Tehran gave a 'real' guarantee, speaking to reporters on Air Force One departing China after Xi summit. This represents apparent shift from his previous demand that Iran permanently halt its program. Details of guarantees still being worked out. Nuclear moratorium duration remains key sticking point (US 20 years vs Iran 5 years).
tag_reason: 트럼프의 '영구 중단' 요구에서 '20년 모라토리엄 + 실질 보장' 조건부 양보는 5/15 아라그치 '핵 교착' 인정 후 첫 구체적 대안 제시로 신규
